script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
echo '=== PHASE 0: VPS SECURITY DIAGNOSTIC ==='
echo ''
echo '--- 1. UFW STATUS ---'
ufw status 2>/dev/null || echo 'UFW not installed or inactive'
echo ''
echo '--- 2. ALL LISTENING PORTS (external) ---'
ss -tlnp | grep -E '0.0.0.0|:::' | sort
echo ''
echo '--- 3. SSH CONFIG ---'
grep -E 'PermitRootLogin|PasswordAuthentication|ChallengeResponseAuthentication|PubkeyAuthentication' /etc/ssh/sshd_config | grep -v '^#' || echo 'No explicit SSH settings found'
echo ''
echo '--- 4. SSH KEYS ---'
ls -la /root/.ssh/authorized_keys 2>/dev/null && wc -l /root/.ssh/authorized_keys || echo 'No authorized_keys found'
echo ''
echo '--- 5. FAIL2BAN ---'
systemctl status fail2ban 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'fail2ban not installed'
echo ''
echo '--- 6. DOCKER COMPOSE FILES ---'
find /root /home /opt -maxdepth 4 \( -name 'docker-compose*.yml' -o -name 'compose*.yml' \) 2>/dev/null
echo ''
echo '--- 7. DOCKER CONTAINERS AND PORTS ---'
docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Ports}}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'Docker not running'
echo ''
echo '--- 8. UNKNOWN SERVICES 3102, 9090 ---'
ss -tlnp | grep -E '3102|9090' || echo 'Ports 3102, 9090 not listening'
echo ''
echo '--- 9. GITHUB-WEBHOOK SERVICE ---'
systemctl status github-webhook 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo 'github-webhook service not found'
echo ''
echo '--- 10. DOCKER DAEMON CONFIG ---'
cat /etc/docker/daemon.json 2>/dev/null || echo 'No daemon.json found'
echo ''
echo '--- 11. OS INFO ---'
lsb_release -a 2>/dev/null || cat /etc/os-release | head -5
echo ''
echo '=== DIAGNOSTIC COMPLETE ==='
